generated_oml:
// Enablers
instance EcoreMetamodelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Ecore metamodels defining the digital twin metamodel."
    DTDFVocab:enables TwinTransformationService
]

instance XtextDSLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Xtext DSL for device configuration and model transformations."
    DTDFVocab:enables TwinTransformationService
]

instance EclipseHonoBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono MQTT broker for continuous telemetry ingestion."
    DTDFVocab:enables InfluxDBTimeSeriesEnabler
    DTDFVocab:enables DataProcessingAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDittoPlatformEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto platform managing device twin instances."
    DTDFVocab:enables LightingOptimizationService
    DTDFVocab:enables HVACPredictiveControlService
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualAnalyticsDashboardService
    DTDFVocab:enables Immersive3DVisualizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 used for immersive 3D visualization of the building twin."
]

instance DockerKubernetesDeploymentEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker and Kubernetes orchestrating deployment of Ditto, services, and visualization."
]

instance InfluxDBTimeSeriesEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "InfluxDB time-series backend storing continuous sensor streams."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataProcessingAnalyticsService
]

instance PostgreSQLDataStoreEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PostgreSQL database holding historical operation logs."
]

// Acting components
instance ProgrammableLuminaires : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Programmable luminaires integrated as BIM elements with device IDs."
]

instance HVACDamers : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC dampers actuated via API‑enabled control units."
]

instance ElectricBlinds : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electric blinds controlled through the building’s API network."
]

instance HVACControlUnit : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "API‑enabled HVAC control unit embedded in the heating‑ventilation system."
]

// Physical sensing components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Distributed occupancy sensor registered in Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance IlluminanceMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Illuminance meter sending illuminance readings via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:producedData IlluminanceDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature and humidity sensor providing environmental data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2Monitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO₂ monitor collecting air quality metrics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]

// Data transmitted
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance IlluminanceDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IlluminanceMeter
]

instance TemperatureHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureHumiditySensor
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Monitor
]

// Data
instance OccupancyTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy telemetry stored in InfluxDB time-series."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBTimeSeriesEnabler
]

instance IlluminanceTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Illuminance data captured from meters and stored in InfluxDB."
    DTDFVocab:fromData IlluminanceDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBTimeSeriesEnabler
]

instance TemperatureHumidityTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature and humidity readings stored in InfluxDB."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureHumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBTimeSeriesEnabler
]

instance CO2TimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "CO₂ sensor data persisted in InfluxDB."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBTimeSeriesEnabler
]

// Models
instance BIMIFCControlAnnotatedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM IFC model enriched with control annotations validated against IFC schema."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TwinTransformationService
]

instance DittoEntityPropertiesModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Ditto entity models reflecting device properties of the building twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TwinTransformationService
]

instance HistoricalOperationLogsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Historical operation logs stored in PostgreSQL."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PostgreSQLDataStoreEnabler
]

// Services
instance TwinTransformationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ATL rules transform BIM and Ditto entity models into Ditto twin specifications."
    DTDFVocab:provides AutoDeploymentService
]

instance AutoDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Auto‑spawn service using Hono/Ditto configurator for twin instantiation."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataProcessingAnalyticsService
]

instance DataProcessingAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous analytics pipeline processing telemetry from InfluxDB."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceAnalyticsInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveHeatMapInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides RecommendationLogInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustLightingAction
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustHVACAction
]

instance LightingOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data‑driven optimization of lighting schedules."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceAnalyticsInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustLightingAction
]

instance HVACPredictiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive HVAC control via reinforcement‑learning policies."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveHeatMapInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustHVACAction
]

instance VisualAnalyticsDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual analytics dashboards exposing performance metrics."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceAnalyticsInsight
]

instance Immersive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization powered by Unreal Engine 5."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceAnalyticsInsight
]

// Insights
instance PerformanceAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Aggregated performance analytics surface through dashboards."
]

instance PredictiveHeatMapInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive heat maps guide facility manager adjustments."
]

instance RecommendationLogInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization algorithm recommends schedule updates recorded in BIM."
]

// Actions
instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of lighting schedules based on optimization."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustHVACAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic HVAC control adjustments derived from RL policy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// Environment
instance BuildingTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ProgrammableLuminaires
    base:contains HVACDamers
    base:contains ElectricBlinds
    base:contains HVACControlUnit
    base:contains OccupancySensor
    base:contains IlluminanceMeter
    base:contains TemperatureHumiditySensor
    base:contains CO2Monitor
    base:contains BIMIFCControlAnnotatedModel
    base:contains DittoEntityPropertiesModel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Command messages generated by the DT’s control logic are transmitted over Ditto’s MQTT endpoint to Hono, which routes them to the corresponding actuator devices, enabling real‑time actuation of lighting, HVAC, and shading systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time operation with micro‑second to millisecond latency end‑to‑end, supported by MQTT QoS 1, ensuring that sensor updates and actuator commands propagate within <10 ms under normal network conditions."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "System architecture comprising BIM model repository, middleware (Hono + Ditto), data storage (InfluxDB/PostgreSQL), analytical services (Python/Node.js), and visualization layer (Unreal Engine), with APIs exposing state and control."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Captures the entire asset lifecycle: design‑time (BIM model), construction‑time (manufacturing data export), and operation‑time (live monitoring and control); each stage generates specific data feeds into the DT."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validity enforced through IFC conformance checks, semantic drift monitored using ODTE metric, runtime verification of control logic against safety constraints, uncertainty quantified via sensor calibration reports."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication stack: MQTT over TCP/IP using Hono for device connectivity, Ditto’s MQTT endpoint for twin synchronization, RESTful APIs for data queries, optional WebSocket for real‑time dashboards."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted in containerized microservices on a private Kubernetes cluster within the building’s data center; Ditto instance runs in a replicated deployment with HA enabled, time‑series database in a dedicated pod."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Standardized data exchange using IFC services and ABIM, connectivity to external Building Management Systems via OPC‑UA gateways; interoperability with other DTs achieved through Ditto’s tenant isolation and shared topics."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with IFC 4X for BIM, MQTT/TLS for secure messaging, Ditto entity schema following W3C Web of Things standards, MDE processes conform to ISO/IEC 42010."
]
